_metadata.description: Must-not-miss diagnoses for the CDST Diagnosis Stage. Any diagnosis on this list is flagged must_not_miss=true in the differential regardless of its probability ranking. Maintained by Medical Officers — no code change required to add or remove entries.

diagnoses.name: GBS
diagnoses.notes: Guillain-Barré Syndrome — rapidly progressive ascending paralysis

diagnoses.name: cord compression
diagnoses.notes: Acute spinal cord emergency

diagnoses.name: bacterial meningitis
diagnoses.notes: Include encephalitis; LP not available at SHC but clinical flags sufficient to escalate

diagnoses.name: stroke
diagnoses.notes: CVA — thrombolysis window makes early recognition critical

diagnoses.name: tetanus
diagnoses.notes: Still prevalent in rural India; wound history key

diagnoses.name: rabies
diagnoses.notes: Post-exposure prophylaxis window — ask about animal bite

diagnoses.name: AFP
diagnoses.notes: Acute Flaccid Paralysis — mandatory polio surveillance reporting

diagnoses.name: severe malaria
diagnoses.notes: P. falciparum with organ involvement; cerebral malaria

diagnoses.name: sepsis
diagnoses.notes: Any source; time-critical treatment window

diagnoses.name: typhoid with complications
diagnoses.notes: Intestinal perforation or typhoid encephalopathy

diagnoses.name: kala-azar
diagnoses.notes: Visceral leishmaniasis — endemic in West Bengal; fever + splenomegaly

diagnoses.name: diphtheria
diagnoses.notes: Airway compromise; bull-neck appearance

diagnoses.name: ectopic pregnancy
diagnoses.notes: Rupture risk — any female of reproductive age with abdominal pain

diagnoses.name: eclampsia
diagnoses.notes: Seizures in pregnancy or postpartum; also flag pre-eclampsia

diagnoses.name: pre-eclampsia
diagnoses.notes: BP ≥140/90 with symptoms in pregnancy

diagnoses.name: postpartum haemorrhage
diagnoses.notes: Primary or secondary; rapid deterioration

diagnoses.name: postpartum sepsis
diagnoses.notes: Within 6 weeks of delivery

diagnoses.name: placental abruption
diagnoses.notes: Painful antepartum bleeding; fetal compromise

diagnoses.name: acute MI
diagnoses.notes: Chest pain with radiation, diaphoresis, or collapse

diagnoses.name: acute severe asthma
diagnoses.notes: Life-threatening bronchospasm; SpO2 <92%, silent chest

diagnoses.name: tension pneumothorax
diagnoses.notes: Tracheal deviation, absent breath sounds, hypotension

diagnoses.name: acute appendicitis
diagnoses.notes: Perforation risk if delayed; RIF pain + guarding

diagnoses.name: intestinal obstruction
diagnoses.notes: Vomiting + distension + absent bowel sounds

diagnoses.name: peritonitis
diagnoses.notes: Board-like rigidity; any cause

diagnoses.name: severe acute malnutrition
diagnoses.notes: SAM with complications — oedema, infection, hypoglycaemia

diagnoses.name: severe pneumonia
diagnoses.notes: Hypoxia + respiratory distress in child; SpO2 <90%

diagnoses.name: intussusception
diagnoses.notes: Colicky pain + redcurrant jelly stool in infant

diagnoses.name: organophosphate poisoning
diagnoses.notes: Common in rural India — agricultural pesticide exposure; SLUDGE signs

diagnoses.name: snake bite
diagnoses.notes: Neurotoxic or haemotoxic; anti-venom window

diagnoses.name: anaphylaxis
diagnoses.notes: Airway + cardiovascular collapse; adrenaline immediately

diagnoses.name: diabetic ketoacidosis
diagnoses.notes: DKA — Kussmaul breathing, ketotic breath, hyperglycaemia

diagnoses.name: severe hypoglycaemia
diagnoses.notes: BGL <3 mmol/L with altered consciousness

diagnoses.name: heat stroke
diagnoses.notes: Core temp >40°C + CNS dysfunction; not heat exhaustion
